prompt: Restyle ‘Holidays Cheers’ in that Coca-Cola Spencerian script, matching the red fill, white highlights, and green drop-shadows.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which features the black text 'cheers to the holidays', by transforming its typography. Restyle the lettering to emulate the Spencerian script style of the 'Coca-Cola' wordmark seen in image 2. Apply a red fill to the letters, add white highlights, and incorporate a green drop-shadow behind the text.
